What I Do

Services That Deliver Results

From concept to launch, I build websites that look great, load fast, and drive real business growth.

WordPress Development

Custom WordPress themes and plugins tailored to your brand. Fast, secure, and easy to manage.

Custom Websites

Hand-coded, pixel-perfect websites built from scratch. No templates — just clean, performant code.

Speed Optimization

Slow sites lose visitors. I'll audit and optimize your site for lightning-fast load times and Core Web Vitals.

Ongoing Maintenance

Keep your site secure, up-to-date and performing at its best with regular maintenance and support.

Portfolio

Featured Projects

Real results for real businesses. Here are some of my recent builds.

The Perth Table

A premium fine dining website featuring custom menus, gallery integration, and a seamless reservation system. Built for luxury and performance.

Astro Tailwind CSS Vercel

Local Restaurant Redesign

A full WordPress redesign for a Perth restaurant, focusing on mobile ordering and online reservations. Improved page speed by 60%.

WordPress PHP Speed Optimization

E-Commerce Storefront

Custom-built online store with product filtering, secure checkout, and inventory management. Conversion rate increased by 35%.

HTML CSS JavaScript PHP

Business Portfolio Site

Modern, responsive portfolio for a Perth consultancy firm. Achieved 98+ Lighthouse score and top-3 Google ranking.

Astro Tailwind CSS SEO

About Me

Hey, I'm Seb

I'm a web developer based in Perth, Western Australia, passionate about building fast, responsive websites that help businesses grow online.

With experience across WordPress, custom HTML/CSS/JS builds, and modern frameworks like Astro, I deliver sites that not only look great but perform exceptionally — with top-tier SEO, accessibility, and Core Web Vitals scores.

Whether you're a small business needing your first website or an established company looking for a speed overhaul, I'm here to help you get real results from your web presence.
